app.name: Wallet Tools
config.mod-enabled.name: Mod Enabled
config.play-tool-swap-sound.name: Play Tool Swap Sound
config.play-tool-swap-sound.tooltip: Play the Wallet Tools tool swap sound when a wallet tool is readied for use.
config.item-extensions-enabled.name: Item Extensions Compatibility
config.item-extensions-enabled.tooltip: Use the optional Item Extensions API to select the correct stored wallet tool for custom objects and resource clumps added by other mods.
config.item-extensions-debug.name: Item Extensions Debug Logging
config.item-extensions-debug.tooltip: Log Item Extensions resource IDs and requested breaking tools for compatibility troubleshooting.
config.wallet-axe.name: Wallet Axe
config.wallet-axe.tooltip: Store and use the axe from the wallet.
config.wallet-pickaxe.name: Wallet Pickaxe
config.wallet-pickaxe.tooltip: Store and use the pickaxe from the wallet.
config.wallet-hoe.name: Wallet Hoe
config.wallet-hoe.tooltip: Store and use the hoe from the wallet.
config.wallet-watering-can.name: Wallet Watering Can
config.wallet-watering-can.tooltip: Store and use the watering can from the wallet.
config.wallet-pan.name: Wallet Pan
config.wallet-pan.tooltip: Store and use the pan from the wallet.
config.wallet-milk-pail.name: Wallet Milk Pail
config.wallet-milk-pail.tooltip: Store and use the milk pail from the wallet.
config.wallet-shears.name: Wallet Shears
config.wallet-shears.tooltip: Store and use the shears from the wallet.
config.auto-use-enabled.name: Auto Use Enabled
config.auto-use-enabled.tooltip: Master toggle for automatic Wallet Tools logic. Manual wallet hotkeys still work.
config.use-new-tool-use-logic.name: Enable Weapon Hold
config.use-new-tool-use-logic.tooltip: Require Weapon Hold while a fishing rod or weapon is equipped before automatic Wallet Tools use can trigger. When disabled, Wallet Tools uses the original automatic behavior.
config.toggle-auto-use-hotkey.name: Toggle Auto Use
config.toggle-auto-use-hotkey.tooltip: Hotkey to toggle automatic Wallet Tools logic on or off.
config.held-item-auto-use-modifier-hotke: Hold this key while a fishing rod or weapon is equipped to allow automatic Wallet Tools use.
config.auto-axe.name: Auto Axe
config.auto-axe.tooltip: Allows automatic axe supply. Manual axe hotkey still works when this is off.
config.auto-pickaxe.name: Auto Pickaxe
config.auto-pickaxe.tooltip: Allows automatic pickaxe supply. Manual pickaxe hotkey still works when this is off.
config.auto-hoe.name: Auto Hoe
config.auto-hoe.tooltip: Allows automatic hoe supply. Manual hoe hotkey still works when this is off.
config.auto-watering-can.name: Auto Watering Can
config.auto-watering-can.tooltip: Allows automatic watering can supply. Manual watering can hotkey still works when this is off.
config.auto-pan.name: Auto Pan
config.auto-pan.tooltip: Allows automatic pan supply. Manual pan hotkey still works when this is off.
config.auto-milk-pail.name: Auto Milk Pail
config.auto-milk-pail.tooltip: Allows automatic milk pail supply. Manual milk pail hotkey still works when this is off.
config.auto-shears.name: Auto Shears
config.auto-shears.tooltip: Allows automatic shears supply. Manual shears hotkey still works when this is off.
config.use-axe-hotkey.name: Use Axe
config.use-pickaxe-hotkey.name: Use Pickaxe
config.use-hoe-hotkey.name: Use Hoe
config.use-watering-can-hotkey.name: Use Watering Can
config.use-watering-can-hotkey.tooltip: Immediately use the wallet watering can.
config.use-pan-hotkey.name: Use Pan
config.use-milk-pail-hotkey.name: Use Milk Pail
config.use-milk-pail-hotkey.tooltip: Immediately use the wallet milk pail.
config.use-shears-hotkey.name: Use Shears
